title: NuclearCraft Steam Additions
description: Steam machines and stuff for NuclearCraft
body:
More useful steamy stuff for early and late game.

Basically this mod was created as replacement for GT as Steam Era implementation in my mod-pack.

This stuff will be useful at the early play before player gets RF machines and late game when you have High-Pressure steam from the NC reactor which opens you some new recipes 

Zinc Ore generation, new villager house and villager scientist with NC related trades

Brings Heat Exchanger multiblock to work

New machines:
Steam boiler
Steam Blender
Steam Transformer
Steam Crusher
Steam Fluid Transformer
Steam Washer
Steam Compactor
Digital Transformer
Steam Turbine
Heat Exchanger
